name: A large room
description:
The most dominant feature of this room is the large rectangular table in the
middle of the room, surrounded by a dozen chairs.  This room was apparently
decorated in expectance of a large number of guests.  There is a fireplace on
the western wall, made with deep red bricks.  A few simple decorations sit on
top of the mantle, but do little to distract any visitors.  There is a sign
upon the northern wall, beside a doorway.  There are doors to both the west and
east, set near the northern wall.
